name: Turtle Bay Resort Pool & Beach
tagline: Day passes let you use the resort pool with waterslide, plus walk to calm Kuilima Cove for baby turtles.
hours: Pool open 8am–8pm daily; day passes available based on capacity
bestTime: Weekday mornings for pool space; late afternoon for turtle sightings at the cove
kamaaina: Kamaaina day rates available — call ahead for current pricing and availability
talkStory: Originally opened as the Kuilima Resort in 1972, Turtle Bay sits on 840 acres spanning five miles of North Shore coastline. Kuilima Cove, the sheltered bay in front of the resort, is a natural habitat for Hawaiian green sea turtles feeding on limu seaweed. The cove's reef creates calm shallow water even when North Shore surf is pumping. Day-pass guests get pool waterslide access plus beach gear; book ahead on weekends as they cap numbers.
